---
title: "About the Team"
format: html
---

## Group B Team Members

| Name | GitHub |
|------|--------|
| Julie Ngo Tran | [@frjulie8proj](https://github.com/frjulie8-proj) |
| Alina Chen | [@alinayanxi](https://github.com/alinayanxi) |
| Yifan Cui | [@cyifan25dot](https://github.com/cyifan25-dot) |
| Zhiyang Guo | [@guozyang6](https://github.com/guozyang-6) |
| Antara Sudhir | [@sudhirantara](https://github.com/sudhir-antara) |

## About This Project

This research is part of AD688 at Boston University, analyzing
gender disparities in hiring and political influence on employment
patterns using 2024 Lightcast job market data.
